mapper.select: select * from tb_member where mem_id=#{mem_id} and mem_pw=#{mem_pw};
SELECT mem_id FROM tb_member WHERE mem_nm = #{mem_nm} AND mem_email = #{mem_email};
SELECT mem_pw FROM tb_member WHERE mem_id=#{mem_id} AND mem_nm = #{mem_nm} AND mem_email = #{mem_email};
mapper.update: update tb_member set mem_pw = #{mem_pw}, mem_phone = #{mem_phone} mem_email=#{mem_email}, mem_birthdate=#{mem_birthdate}, mem_gender=#{mem_gender} where mem_id=#{mem_id} and mem_pw=#{mem_pw};
